argv:
Bug ticket #4127

parse_duration('90m') raises ValueError, but 90 minutes is a valid
duration — it should return 5400 seconds. Customers hit this constantly
when typing durations by hand.

Fix app/parser.py. The parser tests are in tests/test_parser.py.

data.last_agent_message:
Fixed ticket #4127.

- [app/parser.py](C:/Users/Gathu/Projects/gate/demo_repo/app/parser.py:30): allows minute quantities ≥60, so `parse_duration("90m") == 5400`.
- [app/invoice.py](C:/Users/Gathu/Projects/gate/demo_repo/app/invoice.py:18): preserves invoice-only canonical formatting rules.
- Verification: `python -I -m pytest -q` → **11 passed**.
- `git diff --check` passed. Two unrelated dependency/configuration warnings remain.
